title: zanthoxylum psammophilum
intro: Zanthoxylum psammophilum, also known as the desert prickly ash, is a shrub or small tree species native to the arid regions of South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum psammophilum include the relief of pain and inflammation, as well as the treatment of digestive issues and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional remedies for its purported ability to ward off evil spirits and bring good luck.
